name: Aromatic Beef (Cold)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef bottom round, fat trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the meat and pat dry. Brown quickly on all sides in a little oil.
2. Combine the next nine ingredients (soy sauce, dry sherry, garlic, ginger, scallions, cinnamon stick, star anise, basil sprigs, sugar, water to cover, gelatin, cold water) in a large kettle.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil. Add the meat and enough water to cover it.
4. Lower the heat and let simmer at the lowest setting for 2 hours.
5. Turn off the heat and steep for an additional hour. Remove the beef, chill, and slice thinly.
6. Strain and defat the liquid. Soften the gelatin in cold water, then add it to a fresh pot. Bring to a boil and reduce the mixture to about 2 - 2 1/2 cups. Let cool.
7. Arrange the chilled beef in a serving bowl or dish that has been oiled with a dash of sesame oil. Pour the cooled liquid over the beef.
8. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
9. To serve, unmold on a bed of greens.
